name: the-world-outside
prompt: Wide shot through window. Futuristic city at night, military convoys still moving, broadcast towers still cycling. The fracture continuing without pause. The world doesn't stop. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: not-counting
prompt: Close-up on dark-haired man, final image. Still, alone. Dark eyes distant. Cool blue light, heavy grief. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting, high detail
